'''govabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbed|nibbed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbed|nibbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| govabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:govabithi|govabithi]] || [[word:govabiji|govabiji]] || [[word:govabishi|govabishi]] || [[word:govabiki|govabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:govabuthuthu|govabuthuthu]] || [[word:govabujuju|govabujuju]] || [[word:govabushushu|govabushushu]] || [[word:govabukuku|govabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:govabuthu|govabuthu]] || [[word:govabuju|govabuju]] || [[word:govabushu|govabushu]] || [[word:govabuku|govabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:govabufthuf|govabufthuf]] || [[word:govabufjuf|govabufjuf]] || [[word:govabufshuf|govabufshuf]] || [[word:govabufkuf|govabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:govabethe|govabethe]] || [[word:govabeje|govabeje]] || [[word:govabeshe|govabeshe]] || [[word:govabeke|govabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:govabothotho|govabothotho]] || [[word:govabojojo|govabojojo]] || [[word:govaboshosho|govaboshosho]] || [[word:govabokoko|govabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:govabotho|govabotho]] || [[word:govabojo|govabojo]] || [[word:govabosho|govabosho]] || [[word:govaboko|govaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:govabofthof|govabofthof]] || [[word:govabofjof|govabofjof]] || [[word:govabofshof|govabofshof]] || [[word:govabofkof|govabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:govabÃŸfthÃŸf|govabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfjÃŸf|govabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfshÃŸf|govabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfkÃŸf|govabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:govabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|govabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|govabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|govabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|govabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:govabÃŸfthÃŸf|govabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfjÃŸf|govabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfshÃŸf|govabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfkÃŸf|govabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:govabÃŸfthÃŸf|govabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfjÃŸf|govabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfshÃŸf|govabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:govabÃŸfkÃŸf|govabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:govabÃḊthÃḊ|govabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:govabÃḊjÃḊ|govabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:govabÃḊshÃḊ|govabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:govabÃḊkÃḊ|govabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:govabathatha|govabathatha]] || [[word:govabajaja|govabajaja]] || [[word:govabashasha|govabashasha]] || [[word:govabakaka|govabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:govabatha|govabatha]] || [[word:govabaja|govabaja]] || [[word:govabasha|govabasha]] || [[word:govabaka|govabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:govabafthaf|govabafthaf]] || [[word:govabafjaf|govabafjaf]] || [[word:govabafshaf|govabafshaf]] || [[word:govabafkaf|govabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:govabasha|govabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:govabshÃḋsha|govabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govabrosha|govabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govabmusha|govabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:govabyasha|govabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovabnkshÃḋsha|gogovabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovabnkrosha|gogovabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovabnkmusha|gogovabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovabnkyasha|gogovabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:govavabasha|govavabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govavabshÃḋsha|govavabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govavabrosha|govavabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govavabmusha|govavabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govavabyasha|govavabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovavabnkshÃḋsha|gogovavabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovavabnkrosha|gogovavabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovavabnkmusha|gogovavabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovavabnkyasha|gogovavabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gevÃḊbasha|gevÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gevÃḊbshÃḋsha|gevÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gevÃḊbrosha|gevÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gevÃḊbmusha|gevÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gevÃḊbyasha|gevÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gogevÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogevÃḊbnkrosha|gogevÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogevÃḊbnkmusha|gogevÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogevÃḊbnkyasha|gogevÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:govfabasha|govfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:govfabshÃḋsha|govfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govfabrosha|govfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govfabmusha|govfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:govfabyasha|govfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogovfabnkshÃḋsha|gogovfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogovfabnkrosha|gogovfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogovfabnkmusha|gogovfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogovfabnkyasha|gogovfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
